multimodal.tip: Gemini is natively multimodal — reference images/videos in your prompt alongside text for richer analysis

grounding.tip: Enable Google Search grounding to give Gemini access to current, factual information

structuredOutput.tip: Gemini supports JSON schema output — specify the exact schema you want for reliable structured responses

codeExecution.tip: Gemini can execute code internally — ask it to 'run this and show the output' for verified results

roleInit.tip: Set a clear role for Gemini: 'You are a Google Cloud architect with expertise in Kubernetes'

antiPatterns.fix: Remove politeness filler for cleaner, more direct instruction

tips: Gemini supports 1M token context (Gemini 1.5) — paste entire codebases or documents
Use Google Search grounding for real-time factual accuracy
Specify a JSON schema for reliable structured data output
Gemini can run and verify code internally — ask for 'executable results'
For multimodal tasks, describe both the image AND your question clearly
Use 'safety_settings' awareness: avoid sensationalist language that may trigger filters
